name: Push Ups
benefit: Builds upper body strength and core stability
instructions: Start in a plank position with hands slightly wider than shoulders
Lower your body until chest nearly touches the floor
Push back up to starting position
Keep your body in a straight line throughout

name: Squats
benefit: Strengthens legs and glutes, improves balance
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart
Lower your body as if sitting in a chair
Keep your back straight and chest up
Return to starting position

name: Jumping Jacks
instructions: Start standing with feet together, arms at sides
Jump while spreading legs shoulder-width apart
Simultaneously raise arms overhead
Jump back to starting position

name: Plank
benefit: Strengthens core muscles and improves posture
instructions: Start in push-up position
Hold your body in a straight line from head to heels
Engage your core muscles
Keep breathing steadily

name: Lunges
instructions: Step forward with one leg
Lower your hips until both knees are bent at 90 degrees
Push back to starting position
Alternate legs

name: Sit Ups
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent
Cross arms over chest or place behind head
Lift your upper body towards knees
Lower back down slowly

name: High Knees
instructions: Stand in place with feet hip-width apart
Run in place bringing knees up to hip level
Pump your arms for momentum
Maintain quick, steady pace

name: Burpees
benefit: Full-body workout, builds strength and endurance
instructions: Start in standing position
Drop to squat position and place hands on floor
Jump feet back to plank position
Jump feet back to squat, then jump up with arms overhead
